feed.title: Anthropic
feed.subtitle: Anthropic Newsroom, Research, and Engineering posts in one feed.

entry.title: Introducing the Services Track and Partner Hub of the Claude Partner Network
entry.content: In March, we launched the Claude Partner Network, a program for the firms that help enterprises put Claude into production.. Today, we’re announcing two new components that make this ecosystem easier for customers to navigate.

entry.title: What we learned mapping a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats
entry.content: As AI transforms the nature of and methods behind cyberattacks, how well do the techniques and frameworks used by the security community hold up? In a new report, we seek to answer that question.

entry.title: Expanding Project Glasswing
entry.content: We’re extending Project Glasswing to approximately 150 new organizations in more than fifteen countries

entry.title: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC
entry.content: Anthropic has confidentially submitted a draft S-1 registration statement to the Securities and Exchange Commission

entry.title: Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
entry.content: Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital.

entry.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8
entry.content: Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.8, is an upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.

entry.title: Coding agents in the social sciences
entry.content: Results from a survey of 1,260 social scientists about AI and coding agent use.

entry.title: Anthropic opens Milan office to support Italian enterprise, research, and developers
entry.content: We're opening a new office in Milan, our sixth in Europe.

entry.title: Anthropic appoints KiYoung Choi as Representative Director of Korea
entry.content: KiYoung Choi is joining Anthropic as Representative Director of Korea, ahead of the opening of our Seoul office.

entry.title: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas"
entry.content: The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on AI

entry.title: Project Glasswing: An initial update
entry.content: An early update on what we've learned from Project Glasswing.

entry.title: KPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance
entry.content: KPMG integrates Claude across its core business and workforce of more than 276,000 in strategic alliance

entry.title: Widening the conversation on frontier AI
entry.content: Widening the conversation on frontier AI

entry.title: Anthropic acquires Stainless
entry.content: Anthropic acquires Stainless

entry.title: 2028: Two scenarios for global AI leadership
entry.content: Our views on the AI competition between the US and China.

entry.title: Teaching Claude why
entry.content: New research on how we've reduced agentic misalignment

entry.title: Focus areas for The Anthropic Institute
entry.content: At The Anthropic Institute (TAI), we’ll be using the information we can access from within a frontier lab to investigate AI’s impact on the world, and sharing our learnings with the public. Here, we’re sharing the questions that drive our research agenda.

entry.title: Donating our open-source alignment tool
entry.content: Updating Petri to version 3.0 and donating it to Meridian Labs

entry.title: Natural Language Autoencoders
entry.content: Turning Claude's thoughts into text

entry.title: How people ask Claude for personal guidance
entry.content: How people ask Claude for personal guidance

entry.title: Evaluating Claude’s bioinformatics research capabilities with BioMysteryBench
entry.content: Evaluating Claude’s bioinformatics research capabilities with BioMysteryBench

entry.title: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports
entry.content: An update on recent Claude Code quality reports

entry.title: Announcing the Anthropic Economic Index Survey
entry.content: Announcing the Anthropic Economic Index Survey

entry.title: Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs
entry.content: Today, we’re launching Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create polished visual work like designs, prototypes, slides, one-pagers, and more.

entry.title: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
entry.content: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands

entry.title: How we built Claude Code auto mode: a safer way to skip permissions
entry.content: How we built Claude Code auto mode: a safer way to skip permissions

entry.title: Harness design for long-running application development
entry.content: Harness design for long-running application development

entry.title: Eval awareness in Claude Opus 4.6’s BrowseComp performance
entry.content: Eval awareness in Claude Opus 4.6’s BrowseComp performance

entry.title: Building a C compiler with a team of parallel Claudes
entry.content: Building a C compiler with a team of parallel Claudes

entry.title: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals
entry.content: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals

entry.title: Claude is a space to think
entry.content: We’ve made a choice: Claude will remain ad-free. We explain why advertising incentives are incompatible with a genuinely helpful AI assistant, and how we plan to expand access without compromising user trust.

entry.title: Designing AI resistant technical evaluations
entry.content: What we learned from three iterations of a performance engineering take-home that Claude keeps beating.

entry.title: Demystifying evals for AI agents
entry.content: Demystifying evals for AI agents

entry.title: Project Vend: Phase two
entry.content: How Claude turned around its failing vending machine business

entry.title: Effective harnesses for long-running agents
entry.content: Effective harnesses for long-running agents

entry.title: Introducing advanced tool use on the Claude Developer Platform
entry.content: Claude can now discover, learn, and execute tools dynamically to enable agents that take action in the real world. Here’s how.

entry.title: Code execution with MCP: building more efficient AI agents
entry.content: Learn how code execution with the Model Context Protocol enables agents to handle more tools while using fewer tokens, reducing context overhead by up to 98.7%.

entry.title: Making Claude Code more secure and autonomous with sandboxing
entry.content: Learn how Claude Code's new sandboxing feature protects developers with filesystem and network isolation, reducing permission prompts and increasing user safety.

entry.title: Equipping agents for the real world with Agent Skills
entry.content: Discover how Anthropic builds AI agents with practical capabilities through modular skills, enabling them to handle complex real-world tasks more effectively and reliably.

entry.title: Effective context engineering for AI agents
entry.content: Effective context engineering for AI agents

entry.title: A postmortem of three recent issues
entry.content: This is a technical report on three bugs that intermittently degraded responses from Claude. Below we explain what happened, why it took time to fix, and what we're changing.

entry.title: Writing effective tools for AI agents—using AI agents
entry.content: Writing effective tools for AI agents—using AI agents

entry.title: Claude Desktop Extensions: One-click MCP server installation for Claude Desktop
entry.content: Claude Desktop Extensions: One-click MCP server installation for Claude Desktop

entry.title: How we built our multi-agent research system
entry.content: On the the engineering challenges and lessons learned from building Claude's Research system

entry.title: Best practices for Claude Code - Claude Code Docs
entry.content: Tips and patterns for getting the most out of Claude Code, from configuring your environment to scaling across parallel sessions.

entry.title: The "think" tool: Enabling Claude to stop and think
entry.content: A blog post for developers, describing a new method for complex tool-use situations

entry.title: Claude SWE-Bench Performance
entry.content: Explore Claude's breakthrough performance on SWE-Bench, demonstrating advanced software engineering capabilities and code generation accuracy. Learn about our technical evaluation methods.

entry.title: Building Effective AI Agents
entry.content: Discover how Anthropic approaches the development of reliable AI agents. Learn about our research on agent capabilities, safety considerations, and technical framework for building trustworthy AI.

entry.title: Contextual Retrieval in AI Systems
entry.content: Explore how Anthropic enhances AI systems through advanced contextual retrieval methods. Learn about our approach to improving information access and relevance in large language models.
